mustPass: Includes a portfolio route because visual proof is central for graphic production and print businesses.
Includes home and contact as required.
Default routes each have a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Uses Swedish lowercase paths with leading slash and no trailing slash.
Section and route ids are kebab-case slugs.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the business like a generic local service without visual work samples.
Do not imply ecommerce product catalog behavior unless the source content actually supports ordering online.
Do not invent certifications, machine counts, turnaround guarantees or customer logos.
Do not rely on generic lifestyle sections when production details would be more useful.
